summary: Tested both requested features: 1) Child size labels on Bulk Orders page now display age format (2-3 yrs, 3-4 yrs, etc.) - VERIFIED 2) Complete Branded Products feature for souvenirs - VERIFIED (customer-facing UI with Unbranded/Branded selection, design source options, and all backend APIs working)

issues: Console warning: An empty string was passed to 'src' attribute on placeholder images - cosmetic only
WebSocket connection warnings (1006 errors) - doesn't affect functionality

souvenir_order_with_branding.test_05_create_souvenir_order_without_br: PASS - Order ID starts with SOU-

admin_branded_orders.test_08_get_branded_orders_list: PASS - Returns orders list with counts

bulk_orders_child_sizes.male_female_sizes: PASS - Male and Female size sections also working (S, M, L, XL, XXL)
bulk_orders_child_sizes.moq_per_color: PASS - 50 pieces per color validation working

souvenirs_branding_feature.branding_option_display: PASS - 'Choose Option:' label with Unbranded/Branded buttons

souvenirs_branding_feature.branded_selection: PASS - Branded button shows checkmark and red styling when selected
souvenirs_branding_feature.cart_branded_item: PASS - Branded badge displayed on cart items
souvenirs_branding_feature.branding_design_section: PASS - 'Branding Design' section appears for branded items

design_source_options.upload_design_option: PASS - 'I will upload my design' with file dropzone
design_source_options.file_upload_input: PASS - File input accepts JPG/PNG max 2MB

admin_products_page.souvenirs_tab: PASS - Fabrics and Souvenirs tabs with counts
admin_products_page.branding_toggle: PASS - 'Enable Branding Option' checkbox with data-testid='has-branding-toggle'

child_sizes_age_format.display: Shows under 'Child Sizes (Age)' label with individual quantity inputs per color

branded_products_feature.customer_flow: Customer selects Unbranded/Branded on product card → Add to Cart → Choose design source → Fill form/upload → Place Order
backend_endpoints: POST /api/orders/souvenir - Create order with branding fields
branded_products_feature.admin_toggle: Enable Branding Option checkbox in Add/Edit Souvenir modal

critical_code_review_comments: Prices displayed in USD ($) on souvenirs page due to currency context, but internally stored as NGN (₦) - functioning as expected based on currency settings
seed_data_creation: Enabled has_branding=true on souvenir 'Branded Mug' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Child sizes on Bulk Orders page now show age format (2-3 yrs, etc.). Branded products feature fully implemented on souvenirs - customer can choose Unbranded/Branded, select design source (upload or TEMARUCO design), fill brief form. Admin can enable branding via /admin/products page Souvenirs tab. Backend endpoints for branding upload, souvenir orders with branding, and admin branded orders management all working.
